settings.title: The People Who Open Up at Six
settings.excerpt: Before most members arrive, two of our team have already cleaned every machine and brewed the first coffee.
settings.body:
If you train early, you will know the gym is spotless and warm before you arrive. That does not happen by accident.

Our opening crew, Sam and Priya, are in well before six. They wipe down every machine, restock the towels, check the kit, and get the coffee going for the early regulars.

Between them they have worked here for nine years and know most of the morning crowd by name. Sam can spot a deadlift form fault from across the room, and Priya runs our beginner inductions.

Next time you are in early, say hello. The friendly faces at the front desk are a big part of why people keep coming back to Olympic.
